data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-06-14)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.26T, down by -3.80% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $104,118 and $106,252 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $105,011, up by 0.34%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include BMT, USTC, and HOME, up by 24%, 18%, and 14%, respectively.

Top stories of the day:

Bitcoin News: Bitcoin Could Hit $119K if Oil Price Rally Pattern Repeats

Ethereum Price News: ETH Price Trends Signal $2,100 Dips as Strategic Buy Zone

Solana News: 7 Solana ETF Issuers File S-1s, but SEC Approval Unlikely Soon, Analysts Say

Ethereum News: Spot Ether ETFs See $2.1M Outflow After Record 19-Day Inflow Streak

BlackRock Becomes Major Institutional Bitcoin Holder with 3% Stake

TMTG's $2.3 Billion Bitcoin Vault Deal Gains SEC Approval

White House Rejects Conflict of Interest Clause in CLARITY Act

SEC Approves DJT's S-3 Registration Statement

Trump Media Technology Group Files Bitcoin Investment Application with SEC

Urgency for Cryptocurrency Legislation in the U.S. Before 2026 Elections

Invesco Galaxy Solana ETF Registers in Delaware

data.title: Will Dogecoin Price Follow Its Long-Term Uptrend and Rally to $1 Soon?
data.description:

The most recent formations have indicated a structure similar to past bullish cycles. Technical and derivatives data have passed early tests of market positioning toward moving higher

data.title: Hong Kong to Release Second Virtual Asset Policy Statement in 2025
data.description: According to PANews, Hong Kong's Acting Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, Joseph Chan, announced plans to release a second policy statement on virtual asset development within this year. The upcoming statement will explore ways to integrate Hong Kong's traditional financial strengths with technological cooperation and innovation in virtual assets. The initiative aims to enhance the security and flexibility of the local real economy and encourage both local and international enterprises to explore innovative applications of virtual assets.
